title: Civil Law – Comprehensive Legal Services
description: Specter & Associates Law Firm offers full legal representation in civil law matters: contracts, damages, property rights, debt recovery and civil litigation. Find out how we can help you.
content:
What Is Civil Law?

Civil law is the branch of law that governs relationships between private individuals and legal entities. It covers a broad spectrum of matters: from entering into contracts and protecting property rights to claiming compensation and enforcing debts. Specter & Associates Law Firm, based in Warsaw, provides comprehensive legal assistance in civil matters at every stage – from initial advice and negotiations through to full court representation.

Scope of Our Civil Law Services

Our team of attorneys and legal counsels has extensive experience in handling civil cases. We provide legal assistance in the following areas:

  • Civil contracts – drafting, reviewing and negotiating sale agreements, lease and tenancy contracts, service agreements, loan agreements, gift deeds and any other civil law contracts. We ensure your interests are properly protected and the terms are clear and unambiguous.
  • Damages and compensation – representing claimants in cases involving compensation for road traffic accidents, medical malpractice, personal injury and property damage. We calculate the damages you are entitled to and fight to recover them in full.
  • Protection of ownership and possession – pursuing vindication and negatory claims, protecting possessory rights, easements and other property rights. We represent clients in disputes over ownership of real estate and moveable assets.
  • Debts and receivables – debt recovery, assignment of claims, settlements, limitation of actions. We advise both creditors and debtors on their respective rights and obligations.
  • Inheritance law – drafting wills, probate proceedings, division of estates, forced heirship claims, declarations of inheritance.

How Does Collaboration With Our Firm Work?

Every matter begins with a free initial consultation during which we analyse the facts of the case and outline the possible legal avenues. We then propose a course of action and inform you of the costs before taking any steps.

Throughout the matter we maintain regular contact with the client – keeping you informed of progress, explaining legal complexities and answering your questions. Specter & Associates operates transparently: no hidden costs, full information at every stage of the proceedings.

We always seek to resolve disputes amicably – mediation and negotiation save time and money. When litigation is necessary, we represent clients before courts of all instances, including the Supreme Court.

Why Trust Us?

Specter & Associates Law Firm is a team of experienced lawyers specialising in civil law. We serve both individuals and businesses. Our strengths are:

  • Experience – over a decade of practice in civil matters, hundreds of successful cases,
  • Individual approach – every matter is important to us, regardless of its value,
  • Effectiveness – precise legal analysis and a sound litigation strategy,
  • Accessibility – prompt contact, flexible appointment times, online consultations available,
  • Location – offices in Warsaw, serving clients throughout Poland and internationally.

Please do not hesitate to get in touch. Our lawyers are available Monday to Friday. The initial consultation is free of charge.
